default.$description: Sunken surface — page bg, kanban wells, input field bgs. Subtle off-white (Gray/25).
Default surface — cards, panels, nav, headers. White (Gray/0).

hovered.$description: Hover overlay on flat surfaces (8% black).

usage.where: The hovered state of elements filled with background/surface/flat.
usage.how: Bind to the hovered interaction in component variants; never as a resting fill.
usage.do: Keep state transitions quick (100–150ms) and consistent.
usage.dont: Don't use as a default fill — resting surfaces use background/surface/flat/default.

pressed.$description: Pressed overlay on flat surfaces (16% black).

usage.where: The pressed state of elements filled with background/surface/flat.
usage.how: Bind to the pressed interaction in component variants; never as a resting fill.
usage.do: Keep state transitions quick (100–150ms) and consistent.
usage.dont: Don't use as a default fill — resting surfaces use background/surface/flat/default.

default.$description: Elevated surface for popovers, dropdowns, floating cards. Pair with a shadow at usage. (White in light mode; will diverge in dark mode.)

hovered.$description: Hover state for raised surfaces (8% black overlay).

usage.where: The hovered state of elements filled with background/surface/raised.
usage.how: Bind to the hovered interaction in component variants; never as a resting fill.
usage.do: Keep state transitions quick (100–150ms) and consistent.
usage.dont: Don't use as a default fill — resting surfaces use background/surface/raised/default.

pressed.$description: Pressed state for raised surfaces (16% black overlay).

usage.where: The pressed state of elements filled with background/surface/raised.
usage.how: Bind to the pressed interaction in component variants; never as a resting fill.
usage.do: Keep state transitions quick (100–150ms) and consistent.
usage.dont: Don't use as a default fill — resting surfaces use background/surface/raised/default.

default.$description: Overlay surface — modal/dialog/full-screen content sitting above raised. Light: white; Dark: Gray/700 (lighter than raised's Gray/800 to reinforce elevation). Pair with shadow/xl.

hovered.$description: Hover overlay on overlay surfaces (8% black overlay on light; 8% white on dark).

usage.where: The hovered state of elements filled with background/surface/overlay.
usage.how: Bind to the hovered interaction in component variants; never as a resting fill.
usage.do: Keep state transitions quick (100–150ms) and consistent.

usage.do: Keep state transitions quick (100–150ms) and consistent.
usage.dont: Don't use as a default fill — resting surfaces use background/surface/overlay/default.

usage.do: Keep state transitions quick (100–150ms) and consistent.

usage.dont: Don't use as a default fill — resting surfaces use background/neutral/default.

default.$description: Default body and UI text.

inverse.$description: Neutral text designed to read on inverted (dark) surfaces — pair with background/inverse.

default.$description: Default brand-coloured text — primary brand emphasis on neutral surfaces.

subtle.$description: Subtle brand-tinted text — secondary brand emphasis on neutral surfaces.

bold.$description: Strong brand-coloured text — emphasized brand statements.

subtlest.$description: Faintest brand-tinted text — meta callouts and de-emphasized brand presence.

boldest.$description: Most-saturated brand text — for the loudest brand moments.

inverse.$description: Brand-coloured text designed to read on inverse surfaces — pair with background/inverse.

default.$description: Default hyperlink text.

hovered.$description: Hovered hyperlink text.

pressed.$description: Pressed/active hyperlink text.

white.$description: Always-white text colour that holds across light + dark modes. Use on brand-fixed elements (logos, illustrations, marketing imagery) that must not invert.

black.$description: Always-black text colour that holds across light + dark modes. Use on brand-fixed elements (logos, illustrations, marketing imagery) that must not invert.

default.$description: Default danger-flavoured text for danger messaging and validation.

bold.$description: High-emphasis danger-flavoured text for danger messaging and validation.

subtle.$description: Subtle danger-flavoured text for danger messaging and validation.

default.$description: Default success-flavoured text for success messaging and validation.

bold.$description: High-emphasis success-flavoured text for success messaging and validation.

subtle.$description: Subtle success-flavoured text for success messaging and validation.

default.$description: Default warning-flavoured text for warning messaging and validation.

bold.$description: High-emphasis warning-flavoured text for warning messaging and validation.

subtle.$description: Subtle warning-flavoured text for warning messaging and validation.

default.$description: Default info-flavoured text for info messaging and validation.

bold.$description: High-emphasis info-flavoured text for info messaging and validation.

subtle.$description: Subtle info-flavoured text for info messaging and validation.

default.$description: Default icon colour.

inverse.$description: Neutral icon designed to read on inverted (dark) surfaces — pair with background/inverse.

default.$description: Default brand-coloured icon — primary brand glyph colour.

subtle.$description: Subtle brand-tinted icon — secondary brand emphasis.

bold.$description: Strong brand-coloured icon — emphasized brand glyphs.

subtlest.$description: Faintest brand-tinted icon — meta-icon contexts and de-emphasized brand presence.

boldest.$description: Most-saturated brand icon — loudest brand glyph contexts.

inverse.$description: Brand-coloured icon designed for inverse surfaces — pair with background/inverse.

white.$description: Always-white icon colour that holds across light + dark modes. Use on brand-fixed elements (logos, illustrations, marketing imagery) that must not invert.

black.$description: Always-black icon colour that holds across light + dark modes. Use on brand-fixed elements (logos, illustrations, marketing imagery) that must not invert.

default.$description: Default danger-flavoured icon for danger messaging and validation.

bold.$description: High-emphasis danger-flavoured icon for danger messaging and validation.

subtle.$description: Subtle danger-flavoured icon for danger messaging and validation.

default.$description: Default success-flavoured icon for success messaging and validation.

bold.$description: High-emphasis success-flavoured icon for success messaging and validation.

subtle.$description: Subtle success-flavoured icon for success messaging and validation.

default.$description: Default warning-flavoured icon for warning messaging and validation.

bold.$description: High-emphasis warning-flavoured icon for warning messaging and validation.

subtle.$description: Subtle warning-flavoured icon for warning messaging and validation.

default.$description: Default info-flavoured icon for info messaging and validation.

bold.$description: High-emphasis info-flavoured icon for info messaging and validation.

subtle.$description: Subtle info-flavoured icon for info messaging and validation.

default.$description: Default UI border.

hovered.$description: Default UI border (hovered state).

pressed.$description: Default UI border (pressed state).

default.$description: Quiet divider / faint border.

hovered.$description: Quiet divider / faint border (hovered state).

pressed.$description: Quiet divider / faint border (pressed state).

default.$description: Strong border for emphasis.

hovered.$description: Strong border for emphasis (hovered state).

pressed.$description: Strong border for emphasis (pressed state).

default.$description: Default brand-coloured border — primary brand outline emphasis.

subtle.$description: Subtle brand-tinted border — for brand-flavoured outlines that should read quietly.

bold.$description: Strong brand-coloured border — emphasized brand outline.

disabled.$description: Disabled border overlay. Light: 8% black; Dark: 8% white. Use on disabled inputs/buttons/controls so the outline reads as non-editable without competing with active states.

white.$description: Always-white border that holds across light + dark modes. Use on brand-fixed elements (logos, illustrations, marketing imagery) that must not invert.

black.$description: Always-black border that holds across light + dark modes. Use on brand-fixed elements (logos, illustrations, marketing imagery) that must not invert.

default.$description: Default danger-flavoured border for danger messaging and validation.

subtle.$description: Subtle danger-flavoured border for danger messaging and validation.

bold.$description: High-emphasis danger-flavoured border for danger messaging and validation.

default.$description: Default success-flavoured border for success messaging and validation.

subtle.$description: Subtle success-flavoured border for success messaging and validation.

bold.$description: High-emphasis success-flavoured border for success messaging and validation.

default.$description: Default warning-flavoured border for warning messaging and validation.

subtle.$description: Subtle warning-flavoured border for warning messaging and validation.

bold.$description: High-emphasis warning-flavoured border for warning messaging and validation.

default.$description: Default info-flavoured border for info messaging and validation.

subtle.$description: Subtle info-flavoured border for info messaging and validation.

bold.$description: High-emphasis info-flavoured border for info messaging and validation.

1.$description: Categorical data-viz token 1 — single value used for avatars, stage indicators, chart series. Pair with text/static/white for text overlays. Aliases Blue/500.

2.$description: Categorical data-viz token 2 — single value used for avatars, stage indicators, chart series. Pair with text/static/white for text overlays. Aliases Purple/500.

3.$description: Categorical data-viz token 3 — single value used for avatars, stage indicators, chart series. Pair with text/static/white for text overlays. Aliases Teal/500.

4.$description: Categorical data-viz token 4 — single value used for avatars, stage indicators, chart series. Pair with text/static/white for text overlays. Aliases Pink/500.

5.$description: Categorical data-viz token 5 — single value used for avatars, stage indicators, chart series. Pair with text/static/white for text overlays. Aliases Orange/500.

6.$description: Categorical data-viz token 6 — single value used for avatars, stage indicators, chart series. Pair with text/static/white for text overlays. Aliases Green/500.

7.$description: Categorical data-viz token 7 — single value used for avatars, stage indicators, chart series. Pair with text/static/white for text overlays. Aliases Red/500.

8.$description: Categorical data-viz token 8 — single value used for avatars, stage indicators, chart series. Pair with text/static/white for text overlays. Aliases Yellow/500.

close.$description: Close-layer shadow tint. Light: 8% black; Dark: 48% black (compensates for dark surfaces).
